summary: Harden approval audit scope function grants for production deployment.

notes: Revokes PostgreSQL default PUBLIC EXECUTE grants from approval audit scope helper functions.
Keeps explicit anon/authenticated EXECUTE grants only where the RLS policies and views require them.
Also updates migration 127 so fresh environments do not inherit PUBLIC function grants.
No additional frontend behavior changes beyond V0.18.27.
The production bundle is rebuilt with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.28.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.28.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.28.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.28.
Run scripts/smoke-timesheet-withdraw.sql on the cloud host after deployment.
known_warnings: V0.18.27 applied 127 successfully but post-deploy grant assertions failed before final verification.
Unit test command currently exits successfully with no matching test files.
